summary: Iteration 35 - v5.0.0 Background Market Data Fetcher Testing PASSED. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend AI Guards collapsible panel working correctly with show/hide toggle.

context_for_next_testing_agent: v5.0.0 background market data fetcher verified. Key changes: (1) New market_data_fetcher.js module fetches live spot prices every 60s during market hours (IST 9AM-3:45PM). (2) New /api/market-data/bg-status endpoint. (3) /api/health and /api/debug now include background_fetcher object. (4) Version bumped to 5.0.0. (5) AI Guards panel now has collapsible show/hide dropdown. Market is currently CLOSED so fetcher shows last_status='market_closed' with 0 fetches. Cached data (nifty50: 23114.5, banknifty: 53427.05) was fetched earlier by frontend.
